name: am.mana/mana-public
title: Mana Public
description: Mana is your Personal Agent for iPhone. Describe what you want in plain language and Mana turns it into a real, runnable creation on your iPhone: apps, trackers, games, widgets, and shared experiences. Create, play, and remix. This MCP manifest points to the read-only public community surface.
